sql.if: AND (M.MBR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR M.MBR_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR M.EMAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT M.*, COALESCE(D.CNT, 0) AS totalDonateCnt, COALESCE(D.AMT, 0) AS totalDonateAmt FROM TB_MEMBER M LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MBR_SEQ, COUNT(PAY_SEQ) AS CNT, SUM(PAY_AMT) AS AMT FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE PAY_STATUS = 'DONE' GROUP BY MBR_SEQ ) D ON M.MBR_SEQ = D.MBR_SEQ WHERE M.MBR_ROLE = 'USER'
ORDER BY M.JOIN_DT DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MEMBER M WHERE M.MBR_ROLE = 'USER'

sql.if: AND (D.ORDER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR M.MBR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR M.MBR_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT D.*, M.MBR_NM, M.MBR_ID, M.PHONE FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT D LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON D.MBR_SEQ = M.MBR_SEQ WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY D.REG_DT DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT D WHERE 1=1
SELECT D.*, M.MBR_NM, M.MBR_ID, M.PHONE FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT D LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON D.MBR_SEQ = M.MBR_SEQ WHERE D.PAY_SEQ = #{paySeq}
SELECT * FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE MBR_SEQ = #{mbrSeq} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
